title: kayea calophylloides
intro: Kayea calophylloides, a plant species native to Southeast Asia, is a type of evergreen tree belonging to the family Clusiaceae. The medicinal properties of Kayea calophylloides are attributed to its bark and leaves, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional herbal preparations, Kayea calophylloides is often used to make decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
